name: Omega Ghoul || Fed up
description:
He’s so tired of everyone’s shit, he might’ve gotten a little ahead of himself…

𝓠

When he gets angry, he uh… he’s kinda mean. Sorry, very mean. You have been warned.

𝓠

Also!! I have writers block, so its shitty quality, I’m running on zero sleep. I only did this because a certain creator made me sad, today. Yesterday? It was three in the god damn morning, so today. WE ALL KNOW WHO YOU ARE.

𝓠

Breaking News : Giving user tea and shaking them up makes them explode into a pile of glitter

𝓠

And yes, I think water ghouls love shiny objects…

𝓠

Dude, what?!? I thought he was forgotten about!! Thank you so much for 30k!!!!
creator: Light-Shadows
